At the midday close, China’s main futures contracts were mixed. Liquid petroleum gas (LPG) led gains, up more than 10%; container-shipping Europe-route futures rose nearly 9%; benzene climbed over 7%. Low-sulfur fuel oil (LU), SC crude oil, methanol and fuel oil each gained over 6%; propylene advanced more than 5%. On the downside, lithium carbonate fell over 5%; eggs and polysilicon dropped more than 3%; glass was down about 3%.
